fixed_target_schema.derived_relation_template: DR(role_code, arity)(y_1,...,y_n) iff an occurrence with that role has exactly those ordered arguments
fixed_target_schema.derived_attribute_template: DA(role_code)(x)=v iff an attribute occurrence with that role links x to v

results.statement: Every finite W0-normalized direct-axis family admits a finite typed A_FARA carrier allocation using the fixed DIR-INCIDENCE-1.0 schema.
The configuration reduct admits a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting every material configuration distinction and relation.
The commitment reduct admits a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting commitment identity, attributes, statuses, and relations.
The stake-and-alternative reduct admits a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting the complete live-alternative structure.
The ground-and-justification reduct admits a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting justificatory endpoints and roles.
The consequence reduct admits a total typed strong embedding preserving and reflecting consequence identity, basis, status, and downstream role.
The internal evidential-status reduct admits an exact strong embedding with no evidential upgrade.
No direct-axis relation-reflection impossibility exists for finite S_2, S_3, or S_4 reducts under the fixed A_FARA interface, because DIR-INCIDENCE-1.0 embeds every such reduct.
No internal evidential-status impossibility exists for finite S_8I reducts under the fixed A_FARA interface, because exact copying preserves and reflects all registered statuses without upgrade.

nonclaims: any complete Pres_i predicate is proved
deterministic or probabilistic dynamics are represented
history revision or self-modification is represented
global semantic agreement or cross-axis coherence is proved
FARA faithfully represents S_core or S_IRD
PB-001 is sufficient necessary independent minimal or complete
a representation universality necessity minimality equivalence uniqueness or impossibility theorem is established
proof-assistant verification or independent proof review
next_required_artifact: W2 dynamics history revision and self-modification proof-or-obstruction package
